# Support

## How to get help

1. **Docs** — [README](../README.md) and [User Guide](../docs/GUIDE.md)
2. **Bugs** — [Bug report](https://github.com/Vadim-Khristenko/vai-framework/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml)
3. **Features** — [Feature request](https://github.com/Vadim-Khristenko/vai-framework/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml)
4. **Security** — [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md)

## Before opening an issue

```powershell
. .\init.ps1
vai-doctor
pwsh -NoProfile -File tests/Smoke-Vai.ps1
```

Include OS, PowerShell version, and the command that failed.
